subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face towards the Countenance! Rejoice in what thou hast attained and witnessed and heard and beheld at the horizon of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتوجه الی الوجه ان افرح بما حضرت و شهدت و سمعت و رایت افق ظهور مکلم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
